allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''user'' and obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''role''\) == ''user'': content = obj[''message''][''content''] if isinstance\(content, str\): print\(''USER:'', content[:200]\) elif obj.get\(''type''\) == ''assistant'' and obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''role''\) == ''assistant'': content = obj[''message''][''content''] if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(''ASSISTANT:'', c[''text''][:200]\) break except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines[-100:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''user'' and obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''role''\) == ''user'': content = obj[''message''][''content''] if isinstance\(content, str\): print\(''USER:'', content[:300]\) elif obj.get\(''type''\) == ''assistant'' and obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''role''\) == ''assistant'': content = obj[''message''][''content''] if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(''ASSISTANT:'', c[''text''][:300]\) break except: pass ")
